title: Elidz%20AX%20GIS%20Sharepoint%20Epm%20Testimonial%20South%20Africa
content:
Page 1 of 1 
 
Reference No:  
ATTENTION:   To whom it may concern  
FROM:    Mr M.  Nontshinga  
ICT Manager  - East London Industrial Development Zone SOC (Ltd)  
SUBJECT:   Recommendation Letter  
DATE:    04 May  2016  
 
To whom it may concern  
 
RECOMMENDATION LETTER  
 
This is to certify that Techno  Brain  has successfully implemented an Enterprise Resource Management System  that consisted 
of the following integration:  
 
Dynamics AX  - this ERP was implemented to help automate the required operations within ELIDZ and also act as a base for 
future and any related automation needs. The following modules were installed:  Financial Management, Procurement and 
Sourcing, Inventory and warehouse  management, Sales and Marketing, Facilities & Service Management, Project 
Management and Accounting, Compliance and Audit, Microsoft Dynamics Enterprise Portal and Human Capital management  
 
GIS - Techno Brain implemented a GIS -centric Asset Management Sys tem to improve the asset visibility, tracking and control 
for ELIDZ’s asset base. The following modules were implemented: Property/ Building Management, Asset Management 
System, SCADA Integration and The Systems Administration.  
 
Microsoft Dynamics  CRM  - Techno Brain implemented CRM for point -and-click configurability, enterprise scalability, and easy 
interoperability to existing applications and databases; with the following modules: Sales force and marketing automation, 
Service Contracts, Lead and opportun ity management, Case management, Sales Order Management and Workflows.  
 
Microsoft SharePoint  - Techno Brain implemented the configuration of seven (7) sites, Configuration of portals, Upgrade and 
Migration of data from old install (limited data).  
 
Enterpri se Performance Management  - Techno Brain implemented the EPM Suite which enabled ELIDZ to create and maintain 
a culture of performance through managing metrics, scorecards, dashboards, initiatives, and plans. The following were the 
benefits ELIDZ derived: Strategy Execution, Automation, Alignment, and Performance Evaluation.  
 
ELIDZ is  happy to confirm the application is running successfully and we are satisfied with Techno Brain’s technical expertise 
and their commitment to adher e to high standards, deliver y in time, ability to train and provide support to our staff.  ELIDZ 
appreciates  the commitment shown by Techno Brain and will continued partner with the organization on future initiatives.  
 
For and on Behalf of  
East London Industrial Development Zone SOC L td
